name: bluwheelz-sales-platform
description: Bluwheelz AI Sales Intelligence Platform - AI Sales Operating System

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/web && npm run lint --workspace=apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared
